lines.speaker: Crefydd
lines.text: Hello there. Have you come to reflect?

lines.speaker: Crefydd
lines.text: It's not for everyone. You are always welcome to pray to Seren here if you wish though. If you prefer, I can offer you the ability to respawn in Prifddinas upon death.

lines.speaker: Crefydd
lines.text: Then it shall be so. From now on, you will respawn in Prifddinas.

lines.speaker: Crefydd
lines.text: As you wish. I'll be here if you change your mind.

lines.speaker: Crefydd
lines.text: It's not for everyone. You are always welcome to pray to Seren here if you wish though. If you prefer, I can revert your respawn point to Lumbridge.

lines.speaker: Crefydd
lines.text: Then it shall be so. From now on, you will respawn in Lumbridge.

lines.speaker: Crefydd
lines.text: As you wish. If you ever tire of respawning in Prifddinas, just let me know.
